— the origin story

X chose Flork for Memes

When X redesigned their category icons, they picked Flork — the minimalist stick figure — to represent all of meme culture. Quietly, officially, Flork became the face of the internet.

Pepe owns Ethereum

Pepe the Frog is the most culturally loaded memecoin ever created. No VC. No roadmap. Just culture — and it won. Born on ETH. Lives forever on ETH.

FLOPE is the crossover

Flork's art style. Pepe's soul. One character. The official meme icon of X fused with the king of ETH memecoins. This was always going to happen.

Clean. Simple. Community.

No team tokens. No VC allocation. LP Locked from launch. 1,000,000,000 supply on Ethereum. Just vibes and line art.
